retrieved_result: Teacher Certification Required NYS Certification Exams Please see Important Information Regarding NYS Certification Exam Safety Nets Effective immediately, the ALST (Academic Literacy Skills Test) has been eliminated. Candidates are NO LONGER REQUIRED to take the ALST for NYS certification. Please see NYSED and NYSTCENYS
Decision_Reason: The result discusses NYS teacher certification and ALST; it has no relation to integrated development environments or software development.
